title: Nutty Dense Bhuna Turkey Neck Stir-fry
description: This kid-friendly Turkish dish features gluten-free turkey neck stir-fried with a nutty blend and served as a satisfying dinner option.

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: preferably a neutral-flavored oil like peanut or canola

ingredients.name: Coriander Seeds
ingredients.notes: ground to a powder if not already

ingredients.name: Sesame Seeds
ingredients.notes: optional for added texture and crunch

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic, stir-fry until softened and fragrant.
Sprinkle coriander seeds, turmeric powder (if using), and salt into the pan. Stir well to combine with ingredients.
Dredge the turkey neck in flour lightly and then fry it until golden brown on all sides; this should take about 5-7 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to medium and add tomato paste, stirring continuously for a few more minutes until slightly thickened.
Gradually pour in about half of the liquid (water or chicken broth) into the pan. Bring to a simmer and let it cook down, adding remaining liquid if needed to cover turkey neck completely.
Cover the wok with a lid and continue cooking on low heat for 15-20 minutes until all moisture is absorbed and the dish is fully cooked through.
Once done, remove from heat, garnish with fresh cilantro leaves, and sprinkle sesame seeds if desired. Serve hot with steamed rice or naan bread.
